title: callista heyneana
intro: Callista heyneana, also known as the golden orchid or yellow orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. Callista heyneana can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and extracts, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
